tickets.summary: HTML API: Update DOCTYPE parsing for spec changes
tickets.description:
[https://github.com/whatwg/html/issues/12023 Issue 12023] was filed with the WHATWG HTML spec (based on WordPress HTML API work). It was resolved in [https://github.com/whatwg/html/pull/12084 PR 12084].

The standard changed how some DOCTYPE declarations determine the document mode. The HTML API doctype class needs to be updated accordingly.

tickets.summary: HTML API: Migrate html5lib-tests to web-platform-tests
tickets.description:
[https://github.com/web-platform-tests/wpt/issues/27868 html5lib-tests have been taken over by web-platform-tests (WPT).]

Update the HTML API tests to point to WPT instead of legacy html5lib-tests.

[https://github.com/web-platform-tests/wpt/blob/c469a8a72a2ce58c04601255a45504ab9f5cc763/html/syntax/parsing The updated test suite in WPT can be found here.]

tickets.summary: HTML API: Update processing instruction parsing
tickets.description:
[https://github.com/whatwg/html/pull/12118 Processing instruction parsing has been updated in the HTML standard.] `<?processing instructions ?>` were transformed into comments, but are now preserved.

[https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/parsing.html#processing-instruction-open-state See the processing instruction states in the standard.]

See #65581 (adds updated tests).

tickets.summary: HTML API: Update parsing for customizable select elements
tickets.description:
The HTML standard is being updated to support customizable select elements. The HTML API should be updated to account for the new changes.

[https://github.com/whatwg/html/pull/10548 WHATWG/HTML PR 10548] had landed with the updates. Several browsers already have support and MDN pages have been updated for [https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Reference/Elements/select select], [https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Reference/Elements/selectedcontent selectedcontent], and a new [https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Learn_web_development/Extensions/Forms/Customizable_select guide on customizable select elements].

There's also an [https://github.com/html5lib/html5lib-tests/pull/178 html5-lib tests PR] that updates tests to account for the changes.
